falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,200 in any 7-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase.
A significant increase in blowoff pressure would contradict the model's current assessment of moderate pressure, suggesting a forced reversal rather than a natural bottoming process.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the foundational comparison used to justify the 'UNKNOWN' verdict, proving the current scenario is not analogous to the reference bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
